DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-08-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF MAGGY BREWER'S DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained with 10 days leave to amend. Defendant is to plead facts that support a defense and comply with California Rule of Court 2.112. It also appears that the following are not affirmative defenses: 1, 11, 13, 15, 16, 19, 21, 22, 23, 24, 25, 26 and 28. Defense 10 appears to allege 3 distinct affirmative defenses. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM/PB) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
